text_original: its fun, the bots are refreshed constantly. best AI app, ive played update: there was an update in June 6th, and it has changed what I liked about this app. I have to take a star away, because this most recent update has ruined the model concept I have build in the middle of my stories.
text_zh: 这很有趣，机器人会不断更新。最好的AI应用，我玩过之后觉得更新了：6月6日有一次更新，它改变了我喜爱这个应用的原因。我不得不减掉一颗星，因为这次最近的更新破坏了我在故事中构建的模型概念。
reply_original: Hi there, we understand your concern about the recent update affecting your story experience. Your feedback is crucial for us to improve. Could you share specific details about the changes that disrupted your model concept? Please email us at support@fantachat.ai so we can investigate and resolve this.
reply_zh: 你好，我们理解您对最近更新影响您的故事体验的担忧。您的反馈对我们改进非常重要。能否分享具体是哪些更改影响了您的模型概念？请通过support@fantachat.ai邮箱联系我们，以便我们进行调查并解决问题。
